description: This source file defines API routes for managing allocations of assets within an asset management system. It uses FastAPI to create endpoints for listing, allocating, returning, transferring, and deciding on asset allocations, integrating with repositories and performing access control and validation.

methods.name: list[AllocationResponse] list_allocations( limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0, user_id: str | None = None, alloc_repo: AllocationsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(get_current_user), )
methods.description: List allocations, limited by user role and optional filters.

methods.name: AllocationResponse allocate( payload: AllocateRequest, alloc_repo: AllocationsRepository = Depends(), assets_repo: AssetsRepository = Depends(), users_repo: UsersRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
methods.description: Allocate an asset to a user, admin-only operation.

methods.name: AllocationResponse return_asset( payload: ReturnRequest, alloc_repo: AllocationsRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
methods.description: Mark an asset allocation as returned, admin-only.

methods.name: AllocationResponse request_transfer( payload: TransferRequestCreate, alloc_repo: AllocationsRepository = Depends(), users_repo: UsersRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(get_current_user), )
methods.description: Request transfer of active allocation to another user.

methods.name: AllocationResponse decide_transfer( allocation_id: str, payload: TransferDecisionRequest, alloc_repo: AllocationsRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
methods.description: Admin decision to approve or reject a transfer request.

ctags.name: allocate
ctags.signature: ( payload: AllocateRequest, alloc_repo: AllocationsRepository = Depends(), assets_repo: AssetsRepository = Depends(), users_repo: UsersRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )

ctags.name: decide_transfer
ctags.signature: ( allocation_id: str, payload: TransferDecisionRequest, alloc_repo: AllocationsRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )

ctags.name: list_allocations
ctags.signature: ( limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0, user_id: str | None = None, alloc_repo: AllocationsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(get_current_user), )

ctags.signature: ( payload: TransferRequestCreate, alloc_repo: AllocationsRepository = Depends(), users_repo: UsersRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(get_current_user), )

ctags.signature: ( payload: ReturnRequest, alloc_repo: AllocationsRepository = Depends(), audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), actor: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
